positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a cosmic forest scene. Central composition features abstract, bioluminescent flora resembling crystalline geometric trees and swirling nebula dust. The color palette is deep indigo, ethereal teal, vibrant lavender, and accented with glowing gold accents. Use high contrast silhouettes against a deep void background. The style should be retro-futuristic vaporwave meets Art Nouveau stained glass, emphasizing clean lines, perfect symmetry, and sharp edges, optimized for single-color screen printing on apparel. High detail, vector art quality, 8K resolution, centered.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, low contrast, grain, extra limbs, poor anatomy, messy, messy lines, grainy, realistic photo, logo, trademark
